name: Golden Eagle Park
description: Golden Eagle Park is a place to play pickleball in Hood River, OR. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to water.

name: Hood River Athletic Club
description: Hood River Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Hood River, OR. There are 4 indoor acrylic and wood courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, lights, trainers or lessons, locker rooms, water, and a pro shop or equipment store. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: May Street Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at May Street Elementary School in Hood River, OR! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. You can’t reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Paddle Point Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Paddle Point Pickleball in Hood River, OR! There is 1 indoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and trainers or lessons. You can reserve the court. A one-time fee is required to play.
